wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the HuntSync AI project overview section. Explain the purpose of this AI-powered job search dashboard, its core value proposition for job seekers, and how it automates job discovery from multiple platforms. Document the key features including multi-platform job scraping, social listening capabilities, and centralized data management. Describe the target audience, primary use cases, and benefits over manual job searching. Include system requirements, supported browsers, and integration capabilities. Provide a high-level architecture overview showing how the application connects to external services like Apify and Google Sheets. Use terminology consistent with the codebase and make content accessible to both technical and non-technical users.

wiki_catalogs.name: Boolean Query Builder
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the boolean query builder interface used to construct LinkedIn search queries. Document the syntax and operators (AND, OR, NOT, parentheses) with practical examples. Explain how to combine keywords, job titles, locations, and company names effectively. Detail the preset query system and common search patterns for different scenarios like remote positions, specific technologies, or senior roles. Include best practices for query optimization, avoiding false positives, and targeting high-quality opportunities. Provide troubleshooting guidance for query construction and explain how the boolean query is processed and executed against LinkedIn's search algorithm.

wiki_catalogs.name: Apify Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Apify integration system. Document the API token setup process, including how to obtain tokens from the Apify console and security best practices. Explain actor ID configuration for different job boards (LinkedIn Jobs, Indeed, Wellfound, Naukri, LinkedIn Post Scraper) with specific examples and validation requirements. Detail the connection testing mechanism and error handling procedures. Document the credential management system including token visibility controls and secure storage practices. Include troubleshooting guides for common connection issues, rate limiting scenarios, and actor configuration problems. Provide step-by-step setup instructions with screenshots and validation steps.

wiki_catalogs.name: Filter Builder
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the filter builder component. Explain the keyword management system including default keyword suggestions, custom keyword addition/removal, and keyword validation. Document the location selection interface with preset locations, custom location input, and location filtering logic. Detail the experience level selector with predefined ranges and career stage options. Explain the job type filtering system supporting Remote, WFO, and WFH configurations. Document the saved filters functionality including filter templates, persistence using localStorage, and filter management operations. Include configuration options for filter creation, editing, deletion, and loading. Provide examples of filter combinations and best practices for effective job searching.

wiki_catalogs.name: Apify Service
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Apify service which handles all web scraping operations via Supabase Edge Function proxy. Document the connection testing functionality, proxy implementation, and multi-platform scraper implementations including LinkedIn Jobs, Indeed, Naukri, Glassdoor, Internshala, Wellfound, Foundit, Hirist, and Shine. Explain the data normalization process, ID generation algorithms, and transformation functions for converting Apify dataset items to Job and LinkedInHiringPost entities. Detail the boolean search query builder for social listening functionality. Include error handling strategies, timeout configurations, rate limiting considerations, and integration patterns with the UI layer. Provide examples of scraper configurations, input parameters, and output data structures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Core Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the core UI components including Button, Card, Input, Select, and Form. Document each component's props interface, default values, event handlers, and styling options. Provide practical usage examples demonstrating common patterns like form validation, button states, and input interactions. Explain the component's accessibility features, keyboard navigation support, and screen reader compatibility. Include guidelines for customizing appearance, integrating with React hooks, and maintaining consistent design patterns throughout the application.

wiki_catalogs.name: Getting Started
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive getting started documentation for HuntSync AI. Include detailed prerequisites covering Node.js version requirements, npm/yarn basics, and development environment setup. Provide step-by-step installation instructions from repository cloning to dependency installation. Document the initial project structure and explain the role of each major directory and file. Include environment variable configuration, local development server startup, and first-time setup procedures. Cover browser compatibility requirements and recommended development tools. Provide troubleshooting tips for common installation issues and verification steps to ensure proper setup. Make this accessible to developers with varying experience levels while maintaining technical accuracy.

wiki_catalogs.name: LinkedIn Post Scraper
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the LinkedIn post scraping functionality that executes boolean queries and retrieves hiring posts. Document the scraping workflow from query execution to data transformation, including integration with Apify actors and the LinkedIn scraping process. Explain the data extraction pipeline, including post metadata, author information, timestamps, and content processing. Detail the rate limiting considerations, API limitations, and workarounds for LinkedIn's anti-scraping measures. Include error handling strategies, retry mechanisms, and performance optimization techniques. Document the transformation process from raw scraped data to structured LinkedInHiringPost objects.

wiki_catalogs.name: Google Sheets Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Google Sheets integration system. Document the complete Google Cloud Platform service account setup process including project creation, API enablement, and key generation. Explain the spreadsheet configuration requirements including sheet names ('All_Jobs_Master' and 'LinkedIn_Hiring_Posts'), sharing permissions, and access control. Detail the service account JSON key management, including secure storage, formatting requirements, and validation processes. Document the connection testing workflow and common authentication errors. Include troubleshooting guides for permission issues, API quota problems, and spreadsheet access failures. Provide security best practices for managing service account credentials and data protection measures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Scraping Operations
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the scraping operations system. Explain the multi-platform scraping architecture supporting LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri, Glassdoor, Internshala, Wellfound, Foundit, Hirist, and Shine. Document the scraper orchestration including sequential execution, parallel processing capabilities, and error handling strategies. Detail the scraping configuration including filter application, result transformation, and duplicate prevention mechanisms. Explain the real-time scraping workflow from filter submission to job data ingestion. Document performance optimization techniques including rate limiting, batch processing, and memory management. Include troubleshooting guidance for common scraping issues such as platform restrictions, CAPTCHA handling, and network failures. Provide monitoring and logging capabilities for scraping operations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Google Sheets Service
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Google Sheets service responsible for data persistence and synchronization. Document the authentication workflow using service accounts, spreadsheet management operations, and data CRUD operations. Explain the data transformation pipeline from internal formats to Google Sheets structure, conflict resolution strategies, and batch operation handling. Detail the integration with the Apify service for data ingestion, the role of local storage caching, and performance optimization techniques. Include examples of spreadsheet configuration, data export/import processes, and error handling for API failures. Document the service initialization, connection management, and cleanup procedures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Layout Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for layout and structural components including Tabs, Table, Breadcrumb, Navigation Menu, and Sidebar. Document the component APIs, data binding patterns, and interaction behaviors. Provide examples of complex layouts, responsive design implementations, and navigation patterns. Explain the component's role in page structure, accessibility considerations for navigation, and integration with routing systems. Include guidelines for customizing layout behavior and maintaining consistent user experience across different screen sizes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Architecture Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create architectural documentation for HuntSync AI's system design. Describe the high-level architecture including the React-based frontend, service layer pattern, and integration with external APIs. Document the component hierarchy starting from App.tsx down to individual UI components. Explain the service-oriented architecture with Apify integration for web scraping, Google Sheets API for data persistence, and configuration management. Detail the data flow from user interactions through services to external integrations. Include technology stack rationale, architectural patterns used (Provider pattern, Observer pattern), and design decisions. Document system boundaries, external dependencies, and integration points. Address scalability considerations, security patterns, and performance optimization strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Keyword Highlighting System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the keyword highlighting system that identifies and emphasizes relevant keywords within LinkedIn posts. Document the keyword detection algorithm, including how detected keywords are extracted from post content and displayed with visual highlighting. Explain the integration between the keyword detection and the UI rendering system, including the HTML markup generation and CSS styling for highlighted terms. Detail the keyword matching logic, case-insensitive matching, and partial word recognition. Include guidance on optimizing keyword lists for better relevance and reducing noise in search results.

wiki_catalogs.name: Control Center
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Control Center functionality. Document the data wiping procedures including the permanent deletion of job records and LinkedIn posts from Google Sheets. Explain the configuration clearing process and its implications for application state. Detail the alert dialog system used for destructive operations and user confirmation workflows. Document the security considerations for these operations and the irreversible nature of data deletion. Include step-by-step guides for each destructive operation with proper warnings and safeguards. Explain the backup recommendations before performing system reset operations and recovery procedures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Results Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the job results management system. Explain the job results table interface including column organization, sorting capabilities, and responsive design. Document the platform tagging system with color-coded badges and platform identification. Detail the application status tracking functionality including status change operations, status persistence, and status visualization. Explain the external link integration for direct job application access and the integration with job board websites. Document the data loading mechanisms including initial load, refresh operations, and real-time updates. Explain the job data structure, field mappings, and data transformation processes. Include performance considerations for large datasets and optimization strategies for smooth table rendering.

wiki_catalogs.name: Configuration Service
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the configuration service managing application settings and credentials. Document the local storage integration, configuration schema validation, and default configuration handling. Explain the credential security measures, encryption patterns, and sensitive data management. Detail the configuration loading and saving mechanisms, migration support for configuration updates, and backup/restore procedures. Include examples of configuration structures, validation rules, and error handling for invalid configurations. Document the integration with the UI components for configuration management and the relationship with environment-specific settings.

wiki_catalogs.name: Feedback Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for feedback and interaction components including Alert, Dialog, Toast, Tooltip, and Spinner. Document the component's state management, animation behaviors, and user interaction patterns. Provide examples of notification systems, modal dialogs, loading states, and contextual help implementations. Explain accessibility features for screen readers, focus management, and keyboard navigation. Include guidelines for implementing appropriate feedback timing, user experience patterns, and integration with application state management.

wiki_catalogs.name: Job Search Functionality
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the job search functionality. Explain the multi-platform job scraping system that integrates with LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri, Glassdoor, and other job boards. Document the filter builder component including keyword management, location selection, experience level filtering, and job type configuration. Detail the saved filters system and template management. Explain the job results table interface with platform tagging, application status tracking, and external link integration. Document the scraping operations including multi-platform support, real-time updates, duplicate prevention, and performance optimization. Include configuration options for scraping frequency, result limits, and filtering criteria. Provide troubleshooting guidance for common scraping issues and integration problems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Status Management System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Document the post status management system that allows users to categorize and track LinkedIn hiring posts. Detail the three status states (Unread, Contacted, Ignored) and their visual representation with color-coded badges. Explain the status update workflow, including both local state updates and persistent storage through Google Sheets integration. Document the UI controls for status changes, including the dropdown selector and immediate feedback mechanisms. Include best practices for organizing posts by status, tracking follow-up actions, and maintaining an efficient workflow for managing multiple recruitment opportunities.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Persistence
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for the data persistence layer. Explain the Google Sheets integration including service account configuration, spreadsheet setup, and authentication mechanisms. Document the job data storage structure, field mappings, and data schema design. Detail the CRUD operations for job records including insertion, retrieval, updates, and status modifications. Explain the data synchronization process between local state and Google Sheets including conflict resolution and offline capabilities. Document the configuration management for Google Cloud Platform credentials and spreadsheet identifiers. Include error handling strategies for API failures, authentication issues, and data consistency problems. Provide guidance on data backup, export capabilities, and migration procedures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Specialized Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Document specialized components including Calendar, Chart, Carousel, Drawer, and Resizable with their unique functionality and use cases. Explain the component's advanced features, configuration options, and integration patterns. Provide examples of data visualization, interactive carousels, slide-out drawers, and resizable panels. Document the component's performance considerations, memory management, and optimization techniques. Include guidelines for extending functionality, custom styling, and maintaining responsiveness across different device types.

wiki_catalogs.name: Social Listening Functionality
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the social listening feature that monitors LinkedIn hiring activity. Document the boolean query builder interface for constructing complex search queries with advanced operators and filters. Explain the LinkedIn post scraper functionality, including query execution, result processing, and data extraction. Detail the keyword highlighting system for identifying relevant opportunities and the recruiter engagement tracking mechanism. Document the status management system for organizing and prioritizing leads. Include best practices for query construction, common search patterns, and optimization techniques. Explain the integration with LinkedIn's API limitations and workarounds. Provide guidance on interpreting results, managing false positives, and maintaining focus on high-quality opportunities.

wiki_catalogs.name: Configuration Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the configuration management system. Document the Apify integration including API token setup, actor ID configuration, connection testing, and troubleshooting procedures. Explain the Google Sheets integration covering service account setup, spreadsheet configuration, permission management, and data synchronization. Detail the control center functionality including data wiping procedures, configuration backup, and system reset options. Document the configuration persistence using browser localStorage and credential security measures. Include step-by-step setup guides for each integration, common configuration errors and their solutions, and best practices for maintaining secure credentials. Explain the configuration validation system and how settings affect application behavior.

wiki_catalogs.name: Component Library
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the comprehensive UI component library built on Radix UI primitives. Document each component including Button, Card, Tabs, Input, Select, Table, Form, and others with their props, attributes, events, and customization options. Provide usage examples with code snippets demonstrating common patterns and advanced configurations. Explain the component composition patterns, accessibility features, and responsive design implementations. Document the styling system using Tailwind CSS classes, theme integration, and dark/light mode support. Include guidelines for extending components, creating custom variants, and maintaining consistency across the design system. Address cross-browser compatibility, performance optimization, and integration with React hooks.

wiki_catalogs.name: Service Layer
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the service layer architecture. Document the Apify service including web scraping orchestration, data transformation pipelines, error handling strategies, and rate limiting mechanisms. Explain the Google Sheets service covering data persistence, authentication workflows, conflict resolution, and performance optimization techniques. Detail the configuration service including local storage management, credential security, default configuration handling, and migration support. Document the service interfaces, method signatures, error codes, and callback patterns. Include integration examples, testing strategies, and troubleshooting guides for each service. Explain the service lifecycle, dependency injection patterns, and how services interact with the UI layer.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Models and Types
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive data model documentation for HuntSync AI's TypeScript interfaces and type definitions. Document the Job interface including structured job data fields, platform-specific properties, status management, and filtering criteria. Explain the LinkedInHiringPost interface covering social listening data structure, engagement tracking fields, and keyword analysis properties. Detail the AppConfig interface for configuration data, Apify configuration models, Google Cloud configuration structures, and user preference types. Document the SearchFilter interface for filter templates, saved search criteria, and template management. Include data validation rules, type constraints, and relationship mappings between entities. Provide examples of data transformation, serialization patterns, and type safety practices used throughout the application.

wiki_catalogs.name: State Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the state management architecture in HuntSync AI. Explain the global state implementation using React hooks and context providers. Document the local storage integration for persisting configuration and user preferences across browser sessions. Detail the component state patterns including controlled vs uncontrolled components, form state management, and data synchronization between UI and backend services. Explain the state update mechanisms, event handling patterns, and how state changes trigger re-renders. Include best practices for state normalization, avoiding unnecessary re-renders, and managing complex state relationships. Document the integration between local state and external services, including loading states, error handling, and optimistic updates.

wiki_catalogs.name: Styling and Theming
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the styling and theming system. Document the Tailwind CSS configuration including custom utilities, component variants, and design system tokens. Explain the dark/light theme implementation using next-themes, theme switching mechanisms, and persistent theme preferences. Detail the utility class patterns, responsive design strategies, and component styling approaches. Document the cn function for conditional class merging, component variant systems, and style composition patterns. Include guidelines for maintaining design consistency, creating custom components with proper styling, and extending the design system. Explain the integration between Tailwind CSS and Radix UI components, ensuring proper theming across all interactive elements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Build and Deployment
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the build and deployment process. Document the Vite build configuration including development server setup, production optimizations, and asset handling. Explain the TypeScript compilation process, path mapping configuration, and type checking workflows. Detail the build scripts defined in package.json including development, production, and preview commands. Document environment variable handling, build-time constants, and deployment preparation steps. Include deployment strategies for various platforms, CI/CD pipeline integration, and automated deployment workflows. Explain performance optimization techniques, bundle analysis, and production debugging strategies. Address common build issues, troubleshooting steps, and best practices for maintaining build reliability.

wiki_catalogs.name: Security Considerations
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive security documentation for HuntSync AI. Document credential management practices including secure storage of API keys, service account credentials, and user authentication tokens. Explain the security implications of browser-based storage, local storage encryption considerations, and data transmission security. Detail the security measures for external API integrations including rate limiting, request validation, and error handling to prevent information leakage. Document best practices for protecting user data, preventing XSS attacks, and securing user inputs. Include guidelines for handling sensitive configuration data, implementing proper access controls, and maintaining audit trails. Address common security vulnerabilities in web applications and their mitigation strategies specific to this job search application.

wiki_catalogs.name: Performance Optimization
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed performance optimization documentation for HuntSync AI. Document loading strategies including lazy loading of components, code splitting techniques, and dynamic imports for optimal bundle sizes. Explain data caching mechanisms, result pagination, and virtual scrolling for large datasets. Detail component optimization techniques including React.memo usage, useCallback optimization, and efficient rendering patterns. Document memory management best practices, cleanup strategies for long-running operations, and preventing memory leaks. Include performance monitoring approaches, profiling techniques, and identifying bottlenecks in the application. Address network optimization for API calls, caching strategies for external data, and reducing payload sizes. Provide guidelines for maintaining performance as the application scales.

wiki_catalogs.name: Troubleshooting Guide
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive troubleshooting documentation for common issues and their solutions. Document frequent problems with Apify integration including authentication failures, actor execution errors, and rate limiting issues. Explain Google Sheets integration problems such as permission errors, API quota limits, and data synchronization failures. Detail configuration-related issues including missing credentials, invalid settings, and connection timeouts. Include step-by-step diagnostic procedures, error message interpretation, and resolution strategies. Document browser-specific issues, extension conflicts, and compatibility problems. Provide logging and debugging techniques, error reporting procedures, and when to seek additional support. Include preventive measures and best practices to avoid common pitfalls.

wiki_catalogs.name: API Reference
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API reference documentation for all service methods and interfaces. Document the Apify service API including method signatures, parameter specifications, return value formats, and error handling patterns. Detail the Google Sheets service API covering data manipulation methods, authentication requirements, and response schemas. Explain the configuration service API including setup methods, validation functions, and persistence operations. Document all public interfaces, method parameters, return types, and callback patterns. Include code examples for each API method, common usage patterns, and integration guidelines. Address authentication requirements, rate limiting information, and API versioning. Provide migration guides for API changes and backwards compatibility notes where applicable.

wiki_overview.content:
<blog>

# HuntSync AI: Comprehensive Job Search Dashboard Analysis

## Project Introduction

**HuntSync AI** is a sophisticated React-based job search dashboard designed to streamline the job hunting process through automated scraping, intelligent filtering, and centralized data management. The application serves as a comprehensive command center for job seekers, aggregating opportunities from multiple sources and providing advanced analytics and tracking capabilities.

### Purpose Statement
The primary goal is to eliminate the manual effort required to monitor multiple job boards by automating the discovery and organization of relevant job opportunities while maintaining detailed tracking of application progress.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- **Automated Job Discovery**: Scrape multiple job platforms simultaneously
- **Centralized Data Management**: Store all job opportunities in a structured Google Sheet
- **Intelligent Filtering**: Allow complex search criteria with saved filter templates
- **Application Tracking**: Monitor application status across different platforms
- **Social Listening**: Track industry trends through LinkedIn post analysis

### Target Audience
- Software engineers and DevOps professionals seeking remote opportunities
- Job seekers in the Indian tech market (with platform support for Naukri, Shine, etc.)
- Professionals looking for cloud computing, SRE, and platform engineering roles

## Technical Architecture

The application follows a modern React architecture with a clear separation of concerns:

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[App Root] --> B[Tabs Navigation]
    B --> C[Job Search Tab]
    B --> D[Social Listening Tab]
    B --> E[Configuration Tab]
    
    C --> F[Filter Builder]
    C --> G[Job Results Table]
    C --> H[Saved Filters]
    
    D --> I[Query Builder]
    D --> J[Hiring Post Feed]
    
    E --> K[Apify Configuration]
    E --> L[GCP Configuration]
    
    F --> M[Apify Services]
    G --> N[Google Sheets API]
    I --> M
    J --> N
    
    M --> O[Supabase Edge Function]
    O --> P[Apify Actors]
    N --> Q[Google Sheets]
```

### Component Breakdown
The application is structured around three main functional areas:
- **Dashboard Components**: Reusable UI elements built with Radix UI primitives
- **Service Layer**: API integrations for external services
- **Data Management**: Local storage and Google Sheets integration

### Design Patterns
- **Service-Oriented Architecture**: Each external integration has dedicated service modules
- **Type Safety**: Comprehensive TypeScript interfaces for all data structures
- **State Management**: React hooks for component state with centralized configuration
- **Modular Design**: Clear separation between UI components and business logic

## Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points
The application bootstraps through a clean React setup with TypeScript:

**Entry Point**: `src/main.tsx`
- Initializes React root with strict mode
- Wraps app in ThemeProvider for consistent theming
- Imports global styles and main App component

**Application Root**: `src/App.tsx`
- Implements tabbed interface with three main sections
- Manages global state for active tab selection
- Provides theme switching functionality

### Core Modules

**Type Definitions**: `src/types/index.ts`
- Comprehensive type system covering all data structures
- Platform-specific types for job listings and LinkedIn posts
- Configuration interfaces for external services
- UI state management types

**Service Layer Architecture**:

**Apify Integration**: `src/services/apify.ts`
- Handles all scraping operations via Apify actors
- Implements proxy pattern through Supabase Edge Function
- Provides standardized job data transformation
- Supports multiple job platforms (LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri, etc.)

**Google Sheets Integration**: `src/services/google-sheets.ts`
- Manages all data persistence operations
- Implements JWT authentication for service accounts
- Provides CRUD operations for job listings and LinkedIn posts
- Handles duplicate detection and data deduplication

**Configuration Management**: `src/services/config.ts`
- Centralized configuration store using localStorage
- Type-safe configuration updates
- Default configuration fallbacks
- Secure credential handling

### Configuration Approach

**Build Configuration**: `vite.config.ts`
- React plugin for component development
- Tailwind CSS integration with custom configuration
- Path aliasing for cleaner imports (`@/` prefix)
- Development server optimization

**Utility Functions**: `src/lib/utils.ts`
- Tailwind CSS class merging utility
- Consistent styling across components
- Conditional class application helper

### External Dependencies

**Core Dependencies**:
- `react` & `react-dom`: Frontend framework foundation
- `@hookform/resolvers`: Form validation integration
- `lucide-react`: Modern icon library
- `apify-client`: Official Apify SDK
- `googleapis`: Google Cloud client libraries
- `recharts`: Data visualization components
- `sonner`: Toast notification system

**Development Dependencies**:
- `@vitejs/plugin-react`: Fast React development
- `typescript`: Type safety and development experience
- `tailwindcss`: Utility-first CSS framework

### Integration Points

**Apify Actor Integration**:
- Uses Supabase Edge Function as proxy to bypass CORS restrictions
- Supports multiple job board actors with standardized outputs
- Implements rate limiting and error handling

**Google Sheets API Integration**:
- Service account authentication with JWT tokens
- Real-time data synchronization
- Automatic duplicate prevention
- Structured data organization

**UI Component Library**:
- Built on Radix UI primitives for accessibility
- Tailwind CSS for consistent styling
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- Dark/light theme support

### Component Relationship Diagrams

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[App Component] --> B[JobSearchTab]
    A --> C[SocialListeningTab]
    A --> D[ConfigTab]
    
    B --> E[Filter Builder]
    B --> F[Job Results]
    B --> G[Saved Filters]
    
    C --> H[Query Builder]
    C --> I[Post Feed]
    
    E --> J[Apify Services]
    F --> K[Google Sheets API]
    H --> J
    I --> K
    
    J --> L[Supabase Proxy]
    L --> M[Apify Actors]
    K --> N[Google Sheets]
```

## Key Features

### Functionality Overview

**Multi-Platform Job Scraping**:
- Automated collection from LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri, Glassdoor, Internshala, Wellfound, Foundit, Hirist, and Shine
- Intelligent job type detection (Remote, WFH, WFO)
- Experience level filtering and keyword-based searches
- Real-time job status tracking

**Advanced Filtering System**:
- Dynamic filter builder with keyword and location combinations
- Saved filter templates for quick reuse
- Local storage persistence for filter configurations
- Default filter suggestions for common job categories

**Social Listening Capabilities**:
- Boolean search query builder for LinkedIn post scraping
- Keyword extraction and highlighting
- Recruiter engagement tracking
- Status management (Unread, Contacted, Ignored)

**Data Management**:
- Centralized job database in Google Sheets
- Duplicate prevention and data deduplication
- Real-time status updates
- Exportable job data for offline analysis

### Implementation Highlights

**Job Search Tab**: `src/components/dashboard/job-search-tab.tsx`
- Comprehensive job aggregation interface
- Real-time job filtering and sorting
- Platform-specific job categorization
- Application status management with visual indicators

**Social Listening Tab**: `src/components/dashboard/social-listening-tab.tsx`
- Advanced boolean search query construction
- LinkedIn post scraping and analysis
- Keyword detection and highlighting
- Recruiter engagement workflow

**Configuration Management**: `src/components/dashboard/config-tab.tsx`
- Secure credential management with masking
- Connection testing for external services
- Setup wizard for initial configuration
- Data cleanup and reset functionality

### Feature Architecture Diagrams

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Configuring: Enter Credentials
    Configuring --> Testing: Test Connections
    Testing --> Ready: Success
    Testing --> Error: Failed
    Error --> Configuring: Fix Issues
    Ready --> Scraping: Start Search
    Scraping --> Loading: Fetching Data
    Loading --> Displaying: Data Loaded
    Displaying --> Updating: Update Status
    Updating --> Displaying: Status Updated
    Displaying --> Scraping: New Search
    Scraping --> Error: API Error
    Error --> Idle: Reset
```

**Performance Considerations**:
- Lazy loading for heavy components
- Debounced search operations
- Efficient data fetching with caching
- Optimized rendering for large datasets

**Security Measures**:
- Credential masking in configuration interface
- Secure token storage in localStorage
- API key validation before execution
- Error handling for sensitive operations

The HuntSync AI dashboard represents a mature, production-ready solution for modern job searching, combining automation, intelligence, and user-friendly interfaces to create a comprehensive job hunting ecosystem.

**Sources:**
- [package.json](package.json)
- [main.tsx](src/main.tsx)
- [App.tsx](src/App.tsx)
- [job-search-tab.tsx](src/components/dashboard/job-search-tab.tsx)
- [apify.ts](src/services/apify.ts)
- [types/index.ts](src/types/index.ts)
- [config.ts](src/services/config.ts)
- [google-sheets.ts](src/services/google-sheets.ts)
- [config-tab.tsx](src/components/dashboard/config-tab.tsx)
- [social-listening-tab.tsx](src/components/dashboard/social-listening-tab.tsx)
- [vite.config.ts](vite.config.ts)
- [utils.ts](src/lib/utils.ts)
- [theme-provider.tsx](src/components/theme-provider.tsx)
- [use-mobile.ts](src/hooks/use-mobile.ts)

</blog>
